languages.text: "Мне {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_ZarkovTraitor}все равно{/d}, кто правит династией и чье имя вписано в Патент, — лишь бы Имперское Кредо соблюдалось. Вы, госпожа Ювенна, достаточно крепки в вере".
languages.translation_comment:
Спикер: Зарков
НЕ играет DL_MerovianKilled и играет DL_TraitorZarkov

traits.locale_text: "Мне все равно, кто правит династией и чье имя вписано в Патент, — лишь бы Имперское Кредо соблюдалось. Вы, госпожа Ювенна, достаточно крепки в вере".
traits.speaker: BranekZarkov

languages.translation_comment:
Спикер: Зарков
НЕ играет DL_MerovianKilled и играет DL_TraitorZarkov

languages.text: "I {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_ZarkovTraitor}don't care{/d} who rules the dynasty or whose name is written on the Warrant, as long as the Imperial Creed is followed. You, Lady Juvenna, seem fairly strong in your faith."
languages.original_text: "Мне {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_ZarkovTraitor}все равно{/d}, кто правит династией и чье имя вписано в Патент, — лишь бы Имперское Кредо соблюдалось. Вы, госпожа Ювенна, достаточно крепки в вере".

traits.locale_text: "I {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_ZarkovTraitor}don't care{/d} who rules the dynasty or whose name is written on the Warrant, as long as the Imperial Creed is followed. You, Lady Juvenna, seem fairly strong in your faith."
"I don't care who rules the dynasty or whose name is written on the Warrant, as long as the Imperial Creed is followed. You, Lady Juvenna, seem fairly strong in your faith."
"I don't care who rules the dynasty or whose name is written on the Warrant, as long as the Imperial Creed is followed. You, Lady Juvenna, seem fairly strong in your faith."

languages.text: “我{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_ZarkovTraitor}不在乎{/d}由谁执掌王朝，也不在乎贸易授状上写的是谁的名字。只要帝国信仰得以遵行即可。尤文娜女士，您在信仰上，似乎足够坚定。”
languages.original_text: "I {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_ZarkovTraitor}don't care{/d} who rules the dynasty or whose name is written on the Warrant, as long as the Imperial Creed is followed. You, Lady Juvenna, seem fairly strong in your faith."

traits.locale_text: “我{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_ZarkovTraitor}不在乎{/d}由谁执掌王朝，也不在乎贸易授状上写的是谁的名字。只要帝国信仰得以遵行即可。尤文娜女士，您在信仰上，似乎足够坚定。”

languages.text: « Je {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_ZarkovTraitor}ne porte que peu d'intérêt{/d} à qui règne sur la dynastie ou au nom inscrit sur la lettre de marque tant que le Credo Impérial est respecté, et dame Juvenna, votre foi me paraît inébranlable. »
languages.original_text: "I {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_ZarkovTraitor}don't care{/d} who rules the dynasty or whose name is written on the Warrant, as long as the Imperial Creed is followed. You, Lady Juvenna, seem fairly strong in your faith."

traits.locale_text: « Je {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_ZarkovTraitor}ne porte que peu d'intérêt{/d} à qui règne sur la dynastie ou au nom inscrit sur la lettre de marque tant que le Credo Impérial est respecté, et dame Juvenna, votre foi me paraît inébranlable. »

languages.text: «Me {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_ZarkovTraitor}da igual{/d} quién gobierne en la dinastía o qué nombre esté escrito en la Patente, siempre que se respete el Credo imperial. La fe de lady Juvenna parece ser firme».
languages.original_text: "I {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_ZarkovTraitor}don't care{/d} who rules the dynasty or whose name is written on the Warrant, as long as the Imperial Creed is followed. You, Lady Juvenna, seem fairly strong in your faith."

traits.locale_text: «Me {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_ZarkovTraitor}da igual{/d} quién gobierne en la dinastía o qué nombre esté escrito en la Patente, siempre que se respete el Credo imperial. La fe de lady Juvenna parece ser firme».

languages.text: "İmparatorluk İtikadı'na uyulduğu sürece hanedanlığı kimin yönettiği ya da Ruhsatname'de kimin adının yazılı olduğu {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_ZarkovTraitor}umurumda değil{/d}. Leydi Juvenna, inancınıza sıkı sıkıya bağlısınız."
languages.original_text: "I {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_ZarkovTraitor}don't care{/d} who rules the dynasty or whose name is written on the Warrant, as long as the Imperial Creed is followed. You, Lady Juvenna, seem fairly strong in your faith."

traits.locale_text: "İmparatorluk İtikadı'na uyulduğu sürece hanedanlığı kimin yönettiği ya da Ruhsatname'de kimin adının yazılı olduğu {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_ZarkovTraitor}umurumda değil{/d}. Leydi Juvenna, inancınıza sıkı sıkıya bağlısınız."

languages.text: "Mit ist {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_ZarkovTraitor}egal{/d}, wer über die Dynastie herrscht oder wessen Name auf dem Handelsbrief steht, solange der imperiale Glaube gewahrt bleibt. Ihr, Lady Juvenna, scheint recht stark in Eurem Glauben zu sein."
languages.original_text: "I {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_ZarkovTraitor}don't care{/d} who rules the dynasty or whose name is written on the Warrant, as long as the Imperial Creed is followed. You, Lady Juvenna, seem fairly strong in your faith."

traits.locale_text: "Mit ist {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_ZarkovTraitor}egal{/d}, wer über die Dynastie herrscht oder wessen Name auf dem Handelsbrief steht, solange der imperiale Glaube gewahrt bleibt. Ihr, Lady Juvenna, scheint recht stark in Eurem Glauben zu sein."

languages.text: 「{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_ZarkovTraitor}誰が王朝を治めようが、その名簿に誰が書かれていようが構わない{/d}。皇国の信条に従っていればよい。貴女、ジュベナ様は信仰が堅いようですね。」
languages.original_text: "I {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_ZarkovTraitor}don't care{/d} who rules the dynasty or whose name is written on the Warrant, as long as the Imperial Creed is followed. You, Lady Juvenna, seem fairly strong in your faith."

traits.locale_text: 「{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_ZarkovTraitor}誰が王朝を治めようが、その名簿に誰が書かれていようが構わない{/d}。皇国の信条に従っていればよい。貴女、ジュベナ様は信仰が堅いようですね。」
